lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥੈ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਥੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਚਾਲਉ ਸਦਾ ਰਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: akathai kaa kiaa katheeai bhaaee chaalau sadaa rajaaee |
lines.english: How can I describe the indescribable, O Siblings of Destiny? I shall follow His Will forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਸੇਈ ਸਾਦੁ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਜਿਉ ਗੁੰਗੇ ਮਿਠਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin chaakhiaa seee saad jaanan jiau gunge mitthiaaee |
lines.english: Only those who taste it know its sweet taste, like the mute, who eats the candy, and only smiles.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਮੇਲੇ ਤਾ ਮਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਿਗੁਰੇ ਮਤਿ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur daataa mele taa mat hovai nigure mat na kaaee |
lines.english: If one meets with the Guru, the Generous Giver, then he understands; those who have no Guru cannot understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਚਲਾਏ ਤਿਉ ਚਾਲਹ ਭਾਈ ਹੋਰ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਕਰੇ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jiau chalaae tiau chaalah bhaaee hor kiaa ko kare chaturaaee |6|
lines.english: As the Lord causes us to act, so do we act, O Siblings of Destiny. What other clever tricks can anyone try? ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਲਾਏ ਤੇਹਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤੂ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਚਲਾਵਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit tudh laae tehaa fal paaeaa too hukam chalaavanahaaraa |
lines.english: As You engage them, they receive the fruits of their rewards; You alone are the One who issues Your Commands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਇਕਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਾਤੇ ਤੇਰਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik bharam bhulaae ik bhagatee raate teraa khel apaaraa |
lines.english: Some are deluded by doubt, while others are imbued with devotional worship; Your play is infinite and endless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕੀਨੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai kirapaa keenee amrit naam adhaaraa |7|
lines.english: One who meets with the True Guru, by His Grace, takes the Support of the Ambrosial Naam. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੀ ਜੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਅਪਣਾ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa karee je kichh hovai apanaa jeeo pindd tumaaraa |
lines.english: I would serve You, if anything were my own; my soul and body are Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਗਨੰਤਰਿ ਵਾਸਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਗਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: gaganantar vaasiaa gun paragaasiaa gun meh giaan dhiaanan |
lines.english: He dwells in the heavenly realms, and his virtues radiantly shine forth; meditation and spiritual wisdom are found in virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰ ਪੀਰਾ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਜਗੁ ਬਉਰਾਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: sabad gur peeraa gahir ganbheeraa bin sabadai jag bauraanan |
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad is his Guru and spiritual teacher, profound and unfathomable; without the Shabad, the world is insane.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਕਹੈ ਕਹਾਵੈ ਤਤੋ ਤਤੁ ਵਖਾਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: naam man bhaavai kahai kahaavai tato tat vakhaanan |
lines.english: The Naam is pleasing to his mind; he speaks it, and causes others to speak it as well. He speaks the essential essence of wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਤਿਤੁਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 titukee |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl, Thi-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਗੀ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੰ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: pooraa bairaagee sehaj subhaagee sach naanak man maanan |8|1|
lines.english: He is a perfect renunciate, naturally at ease, O Nanak, whose mind is pleased with the True Lord. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪਿ ਪੁੰਨਿ ਜਗੁ ਜਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: paap pun jag jaaeaa bhaaee binasai naam visaaree |
lines.english: Because of good and bad deeds, one is born into the world, O Siblings of Destiny; forgetting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he is ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਬੰਧਨੀ ਭਾਈ ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਬੰਧਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa manasaa bandhanee bhaaee karam dharam bandhakaaree |
lines.english: Hope and desire are entrapments, O Siblings of Destiny. Religious rituals and ceremonies are traps.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਗਿ ਮੋਹਣੀ ਭਾਈ ਕਰਮ ਸਭੇ ਵੇਕਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eih maaeaa jag mohanee bhaaee karam sabhe vekaaree |1|
lines.english: This Maya is the enticer of the world, O Siblings of Destiny; all such actions are corrupt. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: sun panddit karamaa kaaree |
lines.english: Listen, O ritualistic Pandit:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਕਰਮਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਭਾਈ ਸੁ ਆਤਮ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit karam sukh aoopajai bhaaee su aatam tat beechaaree | rahaau |
lines.english: that religious ritual which produces happiness, O Siblings of Destiny, is contemplation of the essence of the soul. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤੁ ਬੇਦੁ ਬਕੈ ਖੜੋ ਭਾਈ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: saasat bed bakai kharro bhaaee karam karahu sansaaree |
lines.english: You may stand and recite the Shaastras and the Vedas, O Siblings of Destiny, but these are just worldly actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਚੂਕਈ ਭਾਈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: paakhandd mail na chookee bhaaee antar mail vikaaree |
lines.english: Filth cannot be washed away by hypocrisy, O Siblings of Destiny; the filth of corruption and sin is within you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਡੂਬੀ ਮਾਕੁਰੀ ਭਾਈ ਊਂਡੀ ਸਿਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ein bidh ddoobee maakuree bhaaee aoonddee sir kai bhaaree |2|
lines.english: This is how the spider is destroyed, O Siblings of Destiny, by falling head-long in its own web. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਭਾਈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੈ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur naam na paaeeai bhaaee bin naamai bharam na jaaee |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the Name is not obtained, O Siblings of Destiny; without the Name, doubt does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਘਣੀ ਵਿਗੂਤੀ ਭਾਈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: duramat ghanee vigootee bhaaee doojai bhaae khuaaee |
lines.english: So many are destroyed by their own evil-mindedness, O Siblings of Destiny; in the love of duality, they are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੁ ਸਹਜੁ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਊਪਜੈ ਭਾਈ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saach sehaj gur te aoopajai bhaaee man niramal saach samaaee |
lines.english: True celestial peace comes from the Guru, O Siblings of Destiny; the immaculate mind is absorbed into the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਭਾਈ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਰਹਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satigur seve taa sukh paae bhaaee aavan jaan rahaaee |3|
lines.english: If one serves the True Guru, then he obtains peace, O Siblings of Destiny; his comings and goings are ended. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਕਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਭਾਈ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis antar lobh ki karam kamaavai bhaaee koorr bol bikh khaaee |4|
lines.english: What can anyone do, with greed within? O Siblings of Destiny, by telling lies, they eat poison. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਮਗੁ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur seve so boojhai bhaaee gur bin mag na paaee |
lines.english: One who serves the Guru, understands, O Siblings of Destiny; without the Guru, the way is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਦਹੀ ਵਿਲੋਈਐ ਭਾਈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਨਿਕਲੈ ਤਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: panddit dahee viloeeai bhaaee vichahu nikalai tath |
lines.english: O Pandit, by churning cream, butter is produced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਵਿਗੂਚੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਦੇਉ ਅਲਖੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur bin bharam vigoocheeai bhaaee ghatt ghatt deo alakh |5|
lines.english: Without the Guru, he is ruined by doubt, O Siblings of Destiny; the unseen Divine Lord is in each and every heart. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲੁ ਮਥੀਐ ਜਲੁ ਦੇਖੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਏਹਾ ਵਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: jal matheeai jal dekheeai bhaaee ihu jag ehaa vath |
lines.english: By churning water, you shall only see water, O Siblings of Destiny; this world is like that.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਗਾਠਿ ਨ ਛੂਟਈ ਭਾਈ ਥਾਕੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur gaatth na chhoottee bhaaee thaake karam kamaae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the knots cannot be untied, O Siblings of Destiny; I am so tired of religious rituals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਤਾਗੋ ਸੂਤ ਕੋ ਭਾਈ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਬਾਧੋ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag taago soot ko bhaaee deh dis baadho maae |
lines.english: This world is like a thread of cotton, O Siblings of Destiny, which Maya has tied on all ten sides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: eihu jag bharam bhulaaeaa bhaaee kahanaa kichhoo na jaae |6|
lines.english: This world is deluded by doubt, O Siblings of Destiny; no one can say anything about it. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਭਉ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਭਾਈ ਭੈ ਮਰਣਾ ਸਚੁ ਲੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai bhau man vasai bhaaee bhai maranaa sach lekh |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the Fear of God comes to abide in the mind; to die in the Fear of God is one's true destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਜਨੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਭਾਈ ਦਰਗਹ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: majan daan changiaaeea bhaaee daragah naam visekh |
lines.english: In the Court of the Lord, the Naam is far superior to ritualistic cleansing baths, charity and good deeds, O Siblings of Destiny.
